text: Inline adversarial review (dedicated reviewer lost to spend limit). Verified: (1) fromBreezeView matrix stride mapping correct for BOTH isTranspose cases — (rowStride,colStride)=(majorStride,1) transposed else (1,majorStride), matching Breeze linearIndex; (2) non-positive strides rejected via require (vectors can reverse-slice; matrices never negative) -> copy path; (3) aliasing loudly documented at every viewing entry point; (4) copies bit-exact — Double values only read/written, never recomputed, so NaN/-0.0 survive a round trip; (5) gale->Breeze copy-only is enforced by DoubleArray opacity (adopt is private[gale], JVM Array[Double] wrap = genuine zero-copy view; core stays Breeze-free — interop is a separate JVM-only module). Migration shims throw (mirroring Breeze) and are documented as a one-way port hop. Green: interopBreeze 16/16.
